name: NONOGRAM - GIRL's SWEETS II
short_description: This is a puzzle game called NONOGRAM. Please enjoy cute and sweet anime-like illustrations by solving simple puzzles.
detailed_description:
This is a puzzle game called NONOGRAM. Please enjoy cute and sweet anime-like illustrations by solving simple puzzles.

About this game
The puzzle game "NONOGRAM" is a logical puzzle that completes a picture by guessing which grid you want to fill from a hint.

Feature
Let's solve 10 puzzles and complete one anime-like illustration!
To complete a total of 9 illustrations, you have to solve a total of 90 more difficult puzzles.


Notice
The graphics and musics in this game are used with official permission.

License
Powered by "CRIWARE". CRIWARE is a trademark of CRI Middleware Co., Ltd.
